form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Ballarat (22.71) in a Mix 6/7, finishing a 6 length seventh. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Geelong over 400m in 22.72. Followed that up with a minor placing over 400m at Geelong at Rank Limit - Restricted Win six days ago. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Impressive performance showing plenty of speed to score by 3 lengths in a Mix 6/7 last start at this track, clocking a hot 22.12 for the 390m trip. Rates a top chance again if runs up to latest.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 390m at this track. That followed a win two back in 22.23 beating Dundee Spike over 390m at this track. Thereabouts last start but looks tested this time.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished 4th in a Mix 6/7 on April 10 over 400m at Warragul behind He's A Collinda beaten 9 lengths (23.36). Won at his only start from this box. Can make it two from two.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd in a Mix 6/7 on March 21 over 390m at this track behind Paw Kara beaten half a length (22.32). In the money last time but this is a stern test.
